channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Lebanon seeks ceasefire to allow talks with Israel, official says

Matched Titles:

- Iran war live: Israeli attacks on Lebanon threaten US-Iran ceasefire talks
- What to Know as US–Iran Truce Enters Day 3: Israel Agrees to Lebanon Talks, Strait Debate
- Why is Israel striking Lebanon?
- US to host Israel-Lebanon talks as strikes threaten Iran ceasefire
- Israel seeks Lebanon talks after bombardments threaten Iran truce

- Israel, Lebanon to hold talks in US next week; IDF continues to attack Hezbollah
